text:
Created attachment 219636
patch to update www/rss-bridge to 2020-11-10 release (obtained by svn diff)

(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #2)
>^Triage: If there is a changelog or release notes URL available for this version, 
>please add it to the URL field.

There is no changelog (yet) for this release.
It should be quite massive due to 6 month of intensive development.


>Q/A: USE_PHP should appear earlier in the USES block
Fixed.
